infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VEditor needs access to your photo library to import videos for editing and save exported videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: VEditor needs permission to save exported videos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VEditor needs microphone access for audio recording features.

plugins.photosPermission: VEditor needs photo library access to save exported videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: VEditor needs to save exported videos to your gallery.

plugins.photosPermission: VEditor needs access to your videos for editing.
